# **What problem are we solving?**

1. Reducing friction in PhonePe journey and increasing conversion

# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements overview (optional)

## User stories / User flow

## Requirements

1. Pre-fill PAN on the PAN verification page.
2. Pre-fill Email on the Email verification page from the investorDetails[].email from MFC CAS
3. Separate the Mobile and PAN input screens on the PhonePe MFC check eligibility page. (Lead creation API won’t be changed for now, this will only be a FE change)

---
